{"key_event":"Chartism, free trade, and administrative expansion","reasoning":"Mass petitions, the Anti-Corn Law League, cheap print, unions, and associational life pushed society slightly higher, though Chartist defeats and the Irish famine limited the gain. Professional policing, fiscal centralization, inspection, monetary regulation, and public-health administration increased an already strong state’s reach despite legitimacy damage in Ireland.","society_change":0.2,"society_power":7.8,"state_change":0.3,"state_power":8.3}
